// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import "strings"

// POSTPagePostComment references /post/{slug}/comment/
func POSTPagePostComment(slug string, query QueryPOSTPagePostComment) string {
	anyQuery := query.ParentID != "" ||
		query.Draft != ""

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("@post('/post/") + len(slug) + len("/comment/") + len("')")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}
	n := 0
	if query.ParentID != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		n++
		l += len("pid=") + len(query.ParentID)
	}
	if query.Draft != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		l += len("draft=") + len(query.Draft)
	}

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("@post('/post/")
	b.WriteString(slug)
	b.WriteString("/comment/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}
	n = 0
	if query.ParentID != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		n++
		b.WriteString("pid=")
		b.WriteString(query.ParentID)
	}
	if query.Draft != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		b.WriteString("draft=")
		b.WriteString(query.Draft)
	}
	b.WriteString("')")

	return b.String()
}

type QueryPOSTPagePostComment struct {
	ParentID string `query:"pid"`
	Draft    string `query:"draft"`
}
